jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Aptech
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
